title: quercus dentata subsp. yunnanensis
intro: Quercus dentata subsp. yunnanensis is a subspecies of the Chinese evergreen oak tree, native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antipyretic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Quercus dentata subsp. yunnanensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and treating various gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural defenses.
